title: The other's plushie mod
description: A mod that adds a couple of plushies.
body:
![Plushie group photo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c4fed1795a3582847c576796113c76cd5f57ca0.png)
This mod adds a plushies of some of Wolfertinger's Charcters, The charcters that currently have a plush are:
- Salem
- Hitomi
- Hitch
- Heather
- Magna
- Tammy
- Yappertinger

Plushies that are not of  Wolfertinger's Charcters:
- Anomalocaris
- Amethyst
- Mousie (Owned by Mousegirlheart on tumblr)
- Luv (Owned by mewcharm on tumblr)
- Emma (One of my charcters)
- Painted potato (owned by apaintedpotato on tumblr)
- cupcake (owned by rtgames)
- Bunlith (owned by B0ster on tumblr)
- Hoiren Ho (owned by hoiren Ho on tumblr)
- Dead Eye Fae (owned by deadeyefae on tumblr)
- Finch (owned by jackalopescruff on tumblr)
- Sugar (owned by sugarcarving)
- Asztari (owend by sapphic dice on tumblr)

Other charcter i plan on adding are:

-The wolf girls (Thorn/darcy/luca)

If you have questions/bugs please put them in my ask box on tumblr [@Blitherbug](https://www.tumblr.com/blitherbug).

(Was previosly called "Salem Plushies" but has since been changed cause im adding plushies of other peoples charcters)
All files 1.0.11 and lower will download under the old name of "Salem Plushes",all file between 1.0.11 and 1.0.28 will be called salem plush in files but not in game, files 1.0.29 and higher will have the proper name.
